title: Is There a Monster in My Room?
text:
## Is There a Monster in My Room?

Every night before I {verb} to sleep, I swear I can {verb} noises in my closet. It sounds like a {adjective} {noun} is {verb ending in -ing} in there and it's so {adjective}! When I call my mom and {person}, they never {verb} anything. So I {verb} off the lights and try to {verb}. That's when the {plural noun} start under my {object}. Is it a monster, or something else, like a {noun} or maybe even a {noun}?
